seoTitle: Maclean vs Macquarie Fields — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maclean and Macquarie Fields. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maclean vs Macquarie Fields: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maclean and Macquarie Fields.
heading: Maclean vs Macquarie Fields — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maclean, New South Wales and Macquarie Fields, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maclean has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Macquarie Fields (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maclean or Macquarie Fields safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maclean has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Macquarie Fields scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maclean scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Fields scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maclean or Macquarie Fields?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maclean has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
